allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial project setup: monorepo with React + NestJS

- pnpm workspaces + Turborepo monorepo structure
- apps/web: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind CSS frontend
- services/api: NestJS + Prisma backend
- packages/types: Shared TypeScript type definitions
- Care record \(第5表\) feature scaffolding:
  - Two record types: General + Monitoring evaluation
  - Record type selection, forms, timeline list
  - Prisma schema with all models
  - REST API endpoints for CRUD operations
- Care plan simple management with goal list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
